underlying_goal: Collect detailed on-chain data (trading data, holder address changes, pool changes) for 4 SPV tokens and compile into a daily-granularity Excel report on desktop
friction_detail: Initial report missed holder address data, and Claude struggled with RPC limits before user suggested Dune API.
brief_summary: User wanted a comprehensive Excel report with on-chain data for 4 tokens; after iterating on missing holder data and switching to Dune API, the report was mostly completed.
